perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman appears on camera with a surprised facial expression inside a bakery. (2) A shot showing the exterior of a bakery named "Libreadry" with a long queue of people on the street. (3) The scene shifts to the bakery interior, showing close-ups of various pastries including croissants, egg tarts, and mentaiko-topped bread on wooden shelves. (4) The woman is seen picking out bread with a tray and tongs while talking enthusiastically. (5) The setting changes to an indoor living room where the woman is sitting on a sofa. (6) She tears into a salt croissant and eats it, followed by a large piece of mentaiko French bread, reacting with wide-eyed excitement and nodding. (7) She eats an egg tart and finishes the video by gesturing to the camera with a satisfied smile.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music with rhythmic vocal samples starts immediately. A female voice speaks in an energetic and high-pitched tone in Korean. (2) Music continues with a steady drum beat. Very faint ambient chatter from the bakery is audible in the background. (3) Sharp sound effects like "dings" and "clicks" accompany rapid visual transitions. (4) Explicit foley sounds of bread crunching and being torn are heard clearly during the tasting segment. (5) A brief, lower-pitched male voice is heard responding to the woman in the final seconds before the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "韓國人就傻眼了" (Korean person is dumbfounded) - Hook text. (2) "每天都在排隊的台北麵包店?" (A Taipei bakery with a queue every day?) - Hook text. (3) "一次限20個人進去" (Limit 20 people at a time) - Functional text providing shop rules. (4) "聽說這家的蛋塔跟鹽可頌是必吃" (Heard their egg tarts and salt croissants are must-eats) - Recommendation. (5) "重頭戲來了，這家的明太子法國麵包" (The main event is here: the mentaiko French bread) - Highlight text. (6) "我真的要瘋了...這也太好吃了吧" (I'm going crazy... this is too delicious) - Emotional variety-show style captions. (7) "回訪願意100%" (100% willing to revisit) - Concluding endorsement.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Store Visit & Selection -> Home Tasting & Review -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, approximately 6 people in the outdoor queue, and 5 customers/staff inside the shop.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian female with long dark hair, wearing a light grey button-down cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An urban street with parked scooters and residential buildings; a warm-toned bakery interior with wooden displays; a neutral-colored living room with a beige sofa.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight outdoors and bright, warm artificial lighting indoors.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage -> Linear: Hook -> Discovery -> Selection -> Climax (Tasting) -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy food recommendation vlog targeting fans of bakeries and Taipei food culture. By leveraging the 'Korean visitor' perspective as a hook, the creator emphasizes the popularity and unique flavors of 'Libreadry' to validate its status as a must-visit destination.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product close-ups, explicit mention of the brand name 'Libreadry' (麵包林里), highly positive emotional feedback, and a clear call-to-action regarding revisit willingness.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Korean-Mandarin bilingual content style, high-density 'variety-show' captions, beat-synced food montages.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video successfully uses rapid-fire editing and exaggerated facial expressions to maintain high viewer retention common in short-form social media food reviews.
